ddt:Target.Name: SID 301 - Rm1 D00 - V04
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications K9K Step 2 , X61,X84,J77,X85 pour les versions softs RM1 D0x Base Diag on CAN uniquement Crée le 17/02/2010 Pilote Systeme : Adrian IOSOB adrian.iosob@renault.com ____________________________________________________
ATTENTION : N' UTILISER CETTE BASE QU'A PARTIR DU SOFT RM1-D0X
Version 04 : - Suppression des auto-identifications pour les ancienes versions soft et ajout l'autoidentification pour le soft B1D000 avec les Vdiags $44, $48 et $4C
Version 03 :
-ReadFreezeFrame (transformé en générique suppresssion des octets 32 à 39) -ReadFreezeFrame_03 : Modification de l'octet 33. -Ajout du Device $0651 lié a la ReadFreezeFrame_30. -ReadFreezeFrame_10. Modification de l'octet 32 à 39. -DTC $2610 passage de la ReadFreezeFrame_17 à 10.
Version 02 :
- Implémentation du régime ralenti dans l'écran Ralenti Accéléré. - New Screen updated with the AC Compression Inhibition Configuration - Addition of a new DTC : A/C Refrigerant Charge Loss ($0534h) - Frame $C1 was updated for the compressor. - New Request for AC Compressor Inhibition (Launch and status)
Création de la base CC0 à partir de la version "SID 301 - RM1 CB0 -V04"

Data.Name: EGR throttle state line value
Data.Comment: analog value of the state line status of EGR throttle

Data.Name: Air mass flow
Data.Comment: valeur moyenne de débit d'air réelle

Data.Name: Protected state
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

Data.Name: Engine performance reduction
Data.Comment: performance moteur réduite du à un défaut détecté par le système (Débit limité)

Data.Name: recovery mode activation
Data.Comment: enclenchement d'un mode dégradé (fuel_reducted, CE lamp...)

Item.Text: not default injection gravity 2 tied motor stop
default injection gravity 2 tied motor stop

Data.Name: Engine cranking
Data.Comment: Etat moteur en cours de démarrage (sous démarreur)

Data.Name: Engine running
Data.Comment: Etat moteur en marche ( n'est plus sous démarreur)

Data.Name: Engine power latch
Data.Comment: Etat moteur : calculateur en mode Power-latch

Data.Name: Engine security test
Data.Comment: coupure moteur suite à une demande logiciel

Data.Name: Pre Heating relay actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande du relais de préchauffage

Data.Name: EGR valve actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de la vanne EGR

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 2 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 2

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 1 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 1

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 3 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 3

Data.Name: Injector cylinder 4 actuator
Data.Comment: info de commande de l'injecteur du cylindre 4

Data.Name: Turbo activation
Data.Comment: LV_TEST_RUN_BPA !, info de détection du turbo

Data.Name: EGR activation
Data.Comment: LV_TEST_RUN_EGRV !!, output activated & tested by Static test

Item.Text: EOL test for EGRV not activated
EOL test for EGRV in progress

Data.Name: Fuel Pump Secondary activation
Data.Comment: LV_TEST_RUN_VCV !, sortie détectée et testée par le test statique

Item.Text: EOL test for VCV not activated
EOL test for VCV in progress

Data.Name: First tooth detected after engine stop
Data.Comment: First tooth detected after engine stop

Data.Name: Atmospheric Pressure
Data.Comment: pression atmosphérique vu par le calculateur (capteur interne ou externe)

Data.Name: Engine state through Start-Stop Function
Data.Comment: Engine State through the Start-Stop Function

Data.Name: Differential pressure measurement on particulate filter
Data.Comment: Differential pressure measurement on particulate filter

Data.Name: Torque request at clutch after cruise control intervention
Data.Comment: Torque request at clutch after cruise control intervention

Data.Name: Idle speed torque
Data.Comment: limited torque output of idle speed controller

Data.Name: Torque request after load transient correction
Data.Comment: indicated torque request after load transient correction

Item.Text: Prev1, Prev2, Main1, Main2, Post1, Post2

Data.Name: VGT_so_state
Data.Comment: etat de commande du turbo à géométrie variable

Data.Name: limited output of the vnt regulator i part
Data.Comment: limited output of the vnt regulator i part

Data.Name: Sum with limiation of P part, I part and open loop pwm
Data.Comment: Sum with limiation of P part, I part and open loop pwm

Data.Name: porteur état OBD
Data.Comment: donne les différents états du gestionnaire OBD

Data.Name: CrankingAuthorisation_ECM
Data.Comment: Starter activation enabled by EMS (sent on the CAN)

Item.Text: posting and memo defauts CAN mute/absent not authorised
posting and memo defauts CAN mute/absent authorised

Data.Name: porteur ECM_TorqueControl
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted from ECM Torque control

Data.Name: porteur ECM_to_AT
Data.Comment: carrier for data producted from ECM to AT

Item.Text: assembly line testing and after-sales session
Fup or injection limp home in progress

Data.Name: Hardware No
Data.Comment: reference HARD du calculateur en B.C.D

Data.Name: Other system specifics
Data.Comment: utilisé pour le VMAP et la date synthèse calib en Hexa

Data.Name: Piece No
Data.Comment: Reference du boitier programme (hard + soft + calib)

Data.Name: Supplier No
Data.Comment: Numero ITG du fournisseur en ASCII

Item.Text: assembly line testing and after-sales session

Data.Name: MIL lamp
Data.Comment: demande d'allumage du voyant MIL au TdB par CAN ou filaire

Data.Name: OBD Warm up cycle
Data.Comment: Key on et Teau>seuil + delta teau>seuil

Item.Text: Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Performance
Turbo Charger Boost Control Solenoid Circuit
Manifold Absolute Pressure - Barometric Pressure Correlation
Turbo Charger Boost Sensor A Circuit
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Sensor A Circuit
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Throttle Position Control Circuit
Exhaust Gas Recirculation Throttle Position Control Performance
A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor A Circuit
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit Performance
Brake Pedal Position / Accelerator Pedal Position Incompatible
ECM/PCM Internal Engine Off Timer Performance

Data.Name: provscz3
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°3 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: ExternalTemp_84_CAN
Data.Comment: température de l'air extern vu par le calculateur UCH

Item.Text: not start up of GMV1 (low speed)
not start up of GMV2 (high speed)

Data.Name: Manifold pressure
Data.Comment: pression moyenne dans le collecteur admission

Data.Name: Turbo demand
Data.Comment: Vxx_vnt_map_sp : Manifold air pressure setpoint for normal injection operation

Data.Name: Rail pressure
Data.Comment: pression dans le rail d'injection moyénné sur un segment

Data.Name: Engine stop requested by driver
Data.Comment: Flag indicating that the driver requires engine stop

Data.Name: Freon pressure
Data.Comment: pression de fréon mesuré dans le circuit

Data.Name: Fuel Temperature
Data.Comment: température du gazoil en interne pompe

Data.Name: Cooling fan activation requested by ETCU
Gear Shift in progress inside automatic transmission_CAN
Manufacturer Code
Data.Comment: Ce code a toujours la valeur 0x00

Data.Name: prorlvz1
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 1 for functional CC/SL diagnosis frame (prorlvz1)

Data.Name: prorlvz2
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 2 for functional CC/SL diagnosis frame (prorlvz2)

Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 3 for functional CC/SL diagnosis frame (prorlvz3)

Data.Name: prorlvz4
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 4 for functional CC/SL diagnosis frame (prorlvz4)

Data.Name: proclmz1
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 1 for functional climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: proclmz2
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 2 for functional climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: proclmz3
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 3 for functional climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: proclmz4
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°4 for functionnal climate control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: provscz1
Data.Comment: Producer of parameter area 1 for functional vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: provscz2
Data.Comment: producer of parameter area n°2 for functionnal vsc engine states control diagnosis frame

Data.Name: By-pass EGR command
Data.Comment: RCO de commande du By-pass du refroidisseur des gaz recirculés

Data.Name: EGR setpoint in Single Loop
Data.Comment: Consigne en position de la vanne EGR

Data.Name: EGR valve position reduced
Data.Comment: Egr valve position after the bench testing block

Data.Name: EGR valve position setpoint
Data.Comment: Egr valve position setpoint after closing position

Data.Name: Glowing at engine stop
Data.Comment: Etat moteur en attente de démarrage (pré-chauffage)

Item.Text: Glowing at engine stop in progress

Data.Name: Glow state
Data.Comment: this indicates the state of PRE/POST Heating ( you can modify the list below )

Item.Text: Glow pre start - Glow lamp off
Glow pre start - Glow lamp on

Data.Name: Intake air temperature
Data.Comment: température de l'air vu par le calculateur pour l'agrément de conduite

Data.Name: Active limp home request_injection
Data.Comment: Status flag showing the active limp home requests 1...16

Data.Name: Active limp home request_hydraulic
Data.Comment: Status flag showing the active limp home requests 17...32

Data.Name: Active limp home request_driveability
Data.Comment: Status flag showing the active limp home requests 33...48

Data.Name: Idle speed Increase requested by ACC
Data.Comment: Ralacc : Boolean for accelerated idle speed request by ACC

Data.Name: Segment time for safety monitoring
Data.Comment: Shifted segment time for safety monitoringS

Data.Name: CPU load max
Data.Comment: CPU load MAX of the ECU

Data.Name: Pedal-1 position
Data.Comment: Filtered pedal value normalised to U/Urng

Data.Name: Pedal-2 position
Data.Comment: Filtered pedal value normalised to U/Urng

Data.Name: Torque target without LTC and AJ
Data.Comment: Target indicated torque without LTC and AJ

Data.Name: Slow Torque without AT and Anti-jerk request
Data.Comment: Vxx_arb_tqe_raw :Slow torque withour AT request and without anti-jerk.

Data.Name: Torque setpoint before AJS
Data.Comment: Vxx_arb_tqe_sp :Torque Setpoint before AJS Correction action

Data.Name: ASR setpoint torque sent
Data.Comment: Vxx_asr_tqe_sp :ASR setpoint torque sent to torque arbitration

Data.Name: ASR target torque sent
Data.Comment: Vxx_asr_tqe_tgt :ASR target torque sent to torque arbitration

Data.Name: Powertrain setpoint requested by the driver (pedal)
Data.Comment: Vxx_acel_pdl_pwt_sp :Powertrain setpoint (%) requested by the driver via the accelerator pedal

Data.Name: Minimum torque at clutch
Data.Comment: Minimum torque at clutch, calculated using values from Renault torque structure

Data.Name: Effective engine torque setpoint requested by drivers (real and virtual)
Data.Comment: Vxx_lim_driv_tqe_sp :Effective engine torque setpoint requested by real and virtual drivers

Data.Name: Powertrain setpoint requested by drivers (real and virtual)
Data.Comment: Vxx_driv_pwt_sp :Powertrain setpoint (%) requested by real (pedal) and virtual (ACC/CC/SL) drivers

Data.Name: Effective engine torque target requested by drivers (real and virtual)
Data.Comment: Vxx_lim_driv_tqe_tgt :Effective engine torque target requested by real and virtual drivers

Data.Name: Engine torque setpoint requested by driver without engine brake part
Data.Comment: Vxx_main_driv_tqe_sp :Driver engine torque setpoint without engine brake part

Data.Name: Maximum effective torque
Data.Comment: Vxx_max_avl_tqe :Maximum effective engine torque at current engine speed

Data.Name: Maximum available torque with dynamic limitation
Data.Comment: Vxx_max_dyn_avl_tqe : Maximum available torque with dynamic limitation

Data.Name: MSR setpoint torque sent
Data.Comment: Vxx_msr_tqe_sp :MSR torque setting sent to torque arbitration

Data.Name: Maximum indicated engine torque for smoke limitation
Data.Comment: maximum indicated engine torque for smoke limitation

Data.Name: Gravity 1 recorder kilometer
Data.Comment: Global distance traveled while the WAL_1 is illuminated

Data.Name: Gravity 2 recorder kilometer
Data.Comment: Global distance traveled while the WAL_2 is illuminated

Data.Name: Detected Crash
Data.Comment: Crashvu -Byte for define a coherent frame reception (from Air_bag control unit)

Data.Name: Memorised Crash
Data.Comment: Crashmem - Byte information for the memorisation of a coherent frame reception

Data.Name: _Atmospheric_Pressure_[mbar]
Data.Comment: pression atmosphérique vu par le calculateur (capteur interne ou externe)

Data.Name: _Measured fuel pressure_[MPa]
Data.Comment: Fuel pressure measurement mean value over segment

Data.Name: _Measured intake manifold pressure_[hPa]
Data.Comment: Measured intake manifold pressure per segment

Data.Name: _Accelerator pedal activation_[%]
Data.Comment: Global degree of activation of the accelerator pedal

Item.Text: Prev1, Prev2, Main1, Main2, Post1, Post2

Data.Name: _Fuel Temperature_[°C]
Data.Comment: température du gazoil en interne pompe

Data.Name: _Analog value of the EGR valve Position_[mV]
Data.Comment: Analog value of the EGR valve position

Data.Name: Vnt offset pwm value just before regeneration of FAP
Data.Comment: Vxx_ofs_pwm_pft_bfr_rgn : Vnt offset pwm value just before regeneration of particulate filter

Data.Name: Final Torque Target after AJS
Data.Comment: Vxx_ajs_modu_tqe_tgt :Final Torque Target after AJS Modulation action

Data.Name: ASA_Inhibition of air system adaptation strategy
Data.Comment: Vbx_dsb_fct_asa : Inhibition of air system adaptation strategy by communication tool

Data.Name: ASA_Engine breakpoints learnt
Data.Comment: Vxx_stt_ad_fac :The binary representation of this variable indicates which engine breakpoints have b

Data.Name: _Measured fuel pressure 1_[MPa]
Data.Comment: Fuel pressure measurement mean value over segment

Data.Name: _Accelerator pedal activation 1_[%]
Data.Comment: Global degree of activation of the accelerator pedal

Data.Name: _EGR valve position reduced_[%]
Data.Comment: Egr valve position after the bench testing block

Data.Name: _VGT_so_state_
Data.Comment: etat de commande du turbo à géométrie variable

Data.Name: _Accelerator pedal activation 2_[%]
Data.Comment: Global degree of activation of the accelerator pedal

Data.Name: _Pwm command for egr motorized throttle valve after limitation_[%]
Data.Comment: Pwm command for egr motorized throttle valve after limitation

Data.Name: _Maximum indicated engine torque for smoke limitation_[Nm]
Data.Comment: maximum indicated engine torque for smoke limitation

Data.Name: _Rail pressure_[MPa]
Data.Comment: pression dans le rail d'injection moyénné sur un segment

Data.Name: _Segment time for safety monitoring_[ms]
Data.Comment: Shifted segment time for safety monitoringS

Data.Name: _Measured fuel pressure 2_[MPa]
Data.Comment: Fuel pressure measurement mean value over segment

Data.Name: _Monitoring Accelerator pedal activation _[%]
Data.Comment: Level 2 degree of activation of the accelerator pedal

Data.Name: _AD-value of the MC_[V]
Data.Comment: AD-value of the MC, monitored with RAM test function

Data.Name: _AD-value of the MU_[V]
Data.Comment: AD-value of the MU, monitored with RAM test function

Data.Name: _Battery voltage after relay raw analog value_[V]
Data.Comment: Battery voltage after relay raw analog value

Data.Name: _Egr valve position setpoint after closing position_[%]
Data.Comment: Vxx_emtv_sp_on_off :Egr valve position setpoint after closing position

Data.Name: _EGR throttle state line value_[mV]
Data.Comment: analog value of the state line status of EGR throttle

Data.Name: Water detection in fuel sensor configuration
Water detection in fuel sensor detection
Data.Comment: WD_Active - Water in fuel sensor set in the vehicle configuration

Data.Name: _Glow state_
Data.Comment: this indicates the state of PRE/POST Heating ( you can modify the list below )

Item.Text: Glow pre start - Glow lamp off
Glow pre start - Glow lamp on
Engine stop by electrical cut-off path failed
Engine stop by hydraulic cut-off path failed
Error in selftest / Predrive check error
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Exhaust gas temperature after catalyst voltage
Coolant temperature voltage
Data.Comment: voltage of individual coolant temperature sensor

Data.Name: Manifold pressure voltage
Data.Comment: voltage of the intake manifold pressure sensor (for diagnosis)

Data.Name: EGR valve position voltage
Data.Comment: Analog value of the EGR valve postion potentiometer

Data.Name: Air conditionning pressure voltage
Data.Comment: Air conditionning pressure raw analog value

Data.Name: Exhaust gas temperature pre catalyst voltage
ABS status
Data.Comment: ETAMXABS: ABS ECU status for CAN

Data.Comment: Vxx_agb_min_tqe_sp :Setpoint request wich will be sent to torque arbitration in max bloc

Data.Comment: Vxx_agb_min_tqe_sp :Setpoint request wich will be sent to torque arbitration in max bloc

Data.Comment: Vxx_agb_min_tqe_sp :Setpoint request wich will be sent to torque arbitration in max bloc

Data.Name: Minimal Requested Torque for air system_AT
Data.Comment: Vxx_agb_min_tqe_sp :Setpoint request wich will be sent to torque arbitration in max bloc

Data.Name: Driving force requested by Cruise Control
Data.Comment: Vxx_cru_forc_sp : Driving force requested by Cruise Control

Data.Name: Driving force requested by Speed Limiter
Data.Comment: Vxx_sl_forc_sp : Driving force requested by Speed Limiter

Data.Name: Idle speed routine in progress
Data.Comment: Flag for short term adjustment in progress

Data.Name: Requested stop of the Rail pressure test
Data.Comment: Request to stop test due to engine conditions

Data.Name: Idle speed setpoint requested for Rail Pressure Routine
Data.Comment: Offset for Idle speed setpoint request for EOL+800

Data.Name: Rail Pressure Routine in progress
Data.Comment: Fup set point external request in progress

Data.Name: Ouput of the fuzzy governor after formatting
Data.Comment: Vxx_vnt_reg_dfz_fmt : The ouput of the fuzzy governor after formatting

Data.Name: OBD enablement in dependence of fuel tank level
Data.Comment: flag for enablement of on board diagnostics in dependence of fuel tank level above relevant threshol

Data.Name: OBD enablement in dependence of ambiant temperature
Data.Comment: flag for enablement of on board diagnostics in dependence of ambiant temperature above relevant thre

Data.Name: OBD enablement in dependence of ambiant pressure
Data.Comment: flag for enablement of on board diagnostics in dependence of pressure above relevant threshold

Data.Name: Transmission type M/A
Data.Comment: Vsx_dlin_conf :State data of driveline configuration (Transmission type).

Data.Name: Transmission automatic type
Data.Comment: Vsx_dlin_conf :State data of driveline configuration (Transmission type).

Data.Name: Transmission automatic management
Data.Comment: Vsx_dlin_conf :State data of driveline configuration (Transmission type).

Data.Name: Counter of accelerator pedal safety case detected failure N°1
Data.Comment: Vxx_acel_pdl_secu_ctr :Counter of accelerator pedal safety case detected failure N°1 (memorized)

Data.Name: Clutch signal configuration 2
Data.Comment: Switch if logical clutch signal input should be converted respectively inverted or not

Data.Name: Clutch signal configuration 1
Data.Comment: Switch for clutch signal is supplied by CAN or hardwired

Item.Text: Clutch input is supplied by CAN

Data.Name: Brakelight signal configuration 2
Data.Comment: Switch if logical clutch signal input should be converted respectively inverted or not

Data.Name: Brakelight signal configuration 1
Data.Comment: Switch for brakelight switch signal is coming from CAN or not

Data.Name: ABS absent counter
Data.Comment: M_absent_abs: Non volatile "unit Absent" counter array

Data.Name: ECM Bus Off absent counter
Data.Comment: MBUSOFF: Non volatile "unit Absent" counter array

Data.Name: UPC absent counter
Data.Comment: M_absent_UPC: Non volatile "unit Absent" counter array

Data.Name: BVA absent counter
Data.Comment: M_absent_BVA: Non volatile "unit Absent" counter array

Data.Name: UCH absent counter
Data.Comment: M_absent_UCH: Non volatile "unit Absent" counter array

Data.Name: ECM Mute absent counter
Data.Comment: M_Mute: Non volatile "unit Absent" counter array

Data.Name: UCH status
Data.Comment: ETAMXUCH: UCH ECU status for CAN

Data.Name: TdB status
Data.Comment: ETAMXTDB: TDB ECU status for CAN

Data.Name: Mux Network diag. configuration
Data.Comment: Diagnosis of CAN network produced by ISU - saved in memory

Data.Name: Robotized transmission engine stop request configuration
Global Vehicle speed configuration
Data.Comment: showing vehicle configuration for vehiclespeed and mileage counter

Data.Name: UPC status
Data.Comment: ETAMXUPC : UPC ECU status for CAN

Data.Name: Braketest switch availability
Data.Comment: Switch if there is a braketest switch available or not

Data.Name: Braketest signal configuration 1
Data.Comment: Switch if logical braketest switch input signal should be converted respectively inverted

Data.Name: Distance confirguration
Data.Comment: Flag for distance information coming from ABS: 1:yes 0: no

Data.Name: Braketest switch configuration
Data.Comment: Switch to determine if braketest switch is available and if logical braketest signal should be inver

Data.Name: Brakeligth switch configuration
Data.Comment: Switch to determine if brakeligt switch is available and if logical braketest signal should be inver

Data.Name: Clutch switch configuration
Data.Comment: Switch to determine if clutch input comes in hardwired or by CAN and if logical clutch signal should

Data.Name: Acceleration configuration
Data.Comment: Flag for vehicle acceleration coming from ABS: 1:yes 0: no

Data.Name: Alternator configuration mode
Data.Comment: Permit to chose vehicle type by manual (=0) or auto-configuration (=1)

Data.Name: Alternator power configuration (in case of Calibration configuration)
Data.Comment: In case of manual configuration, permit to chose alt power (=1) or alt power calculation (=0)

Data.Name: Airbag configuration
Data.Comment: Selection of the strategy of restart after a crash

Data.Name: BVA status
Data.Comment: ETAMXBVA : BVA ECU status for CAN

Data.Name: Cruise control and speed limiter warning (overspeed) sent on the CAN network

Item.Text: electrical consumption freezing request (no change allowed)

Data.Name: Alternator power slope sent on the CAN
Alternator maximum allowed power sent on the CAN
Automatic transmission fast-acting torque setting acquired on the CAN
Automatic transmission slow-acting torque setting acquired on the CAN
clock value for the last frame acquired on the mux
ASR target torque acquired on the MUX
MSR torque setting sent to torque arbitration
clock value for the last frame acquired on the MUX (ESP)
ASR in regulation acquired on CAN
AYC in regulation acquired on CAN
Raw hexadecimal value corresponding to the pysical value of TQ_LOSS_POS
FuelLevel_84: fuel tank volume - 0 h = petrol tank reserve
PTC engine idle speed increase, input from the CAN (CLIM_Base frame)
Diagnosis of CAN network produced by ISU
Major failure of the Robotised transmission
AT request of idle speed setpoint acceleration
Raw hexadecimal value corresponding to the pysical value of TQI_SP - TQ_LOSS_POS
Automatic Transmission idle speed setpoint required before rescaling
Raw hexadecimal value corresponding to the pysical value of TQ_ESP_SUB_LIM
Raw hexadecimal value corresponding to the pysical value of TQ_LIM_MIN_1
Cruise control and speed limiter status : parameter sent to the gearbox on the CAN network
CAN network supervising information sent by EMS on the CAN
Show to all systems how a regulation can be done (nominal, precision less ...)
ESP frame acknowledgment bit. this value is set to 1 if there is no request
Multiplexed state of the clutch pedal switch
Engine stop requested by throttle control
Data.Comment: Engine stop requested by throttle control

Data.Name: Engine stop requested by hydraulic cut-off path
Data.Comment: Engine stop requested by hydraulic cut-off path

Data.Name: Engine stop requested by electrical cut-off path
Data.Comment: Engine stop requested by electrical cut-off path

Data.Name: Iduce
Data.Comment: Identify ECM frame for tool need.

Data.Name: Pm1cfre
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorized failure

Data.Name: Pp1cfre
Data.Comment: One of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: Frein1
Data.Comment: braking detected by close brake switch

Data.Name: Pmcomvol
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons memorized failure

Data.Name: Ppcomvol
Data.Comment: Steering wheel control buttons current failure

Data.Name: Pm1cfre_copy
Data.Comment: One of brake switch memorized failure

Data.Name: Pp1cfre_copy
Data.Comment: One of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: Frein3
Data.Comment: Wire connection opened brake switch input (normally closed)

Data.Name: Cnxrv
Data.Comment: State change detection RV position with security on configuration detection (on-off,off-on)

Data.Name: Cnxlv
Data.Comment: State change detection LV position with security on configuration detection

Data.Name: Cnxbtvol
Data.Comment: State change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches

Data.Name: Cnxfr3
Data.Comment: State change detection on opened brake switch

Data.Name: Pm2cfre
Data.Comment: Both of brake switch memorized failure

Data.Name: Pp2cfre
Data.Comment: Both of brake switch current failure

Data.Name: Vbx_cru_sl_lih_daca
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to gearbox limp home

Data.Name: Dacapvv
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to vehicle speed default

Data.Name: Dacacm
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to engine control problem

Data.Name: Dacarvlv
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to CC/SL failure detection

Data.Name: Dacnsusp
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to suspend switch press

Data.Name: Dacnpm
Data.Comment: Deactivation due to AGB at neutral detection

Data.Name: Dacnrvit
Data.Comment: Deactivation because set speed/vehicle speed ratio is incoherent

Data.Name: Vbx_ptc_is_acel
Data.Comment: engine idle speeded-up request from UCH

Data.Name: FLGCLIM1
Data.Comment: Carrier for data received from UCH

Data.Name: FLGCLIM2
Data.Comment: Carrier for data received from AT

Data.Name: FLGCLIM3
Data.Comment: Carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: Vxx_l_prs_ac_diag
Data.Comment: Test of the cooling gas load

Item.Text: Test conditions satisfied and correct cooling gas load
Test conditions satisfied and incorrect cooling gas load

Data.Name: Prsclim/2
Data.Comment: Relative air conditioning pressure for diagnosis (divided by 2)

Data.Name: FLGCLIM4
Data.Comment: Carrier for data produced by ECM

Data.Name: Cnxac
Data.Comment: State change detection "ACC" with security on configuration detection (on-off, off-on)

Data.Name: FLGVSC1
Data.Comment: Carrier for data received from AT

Data.Name: FLGVSC2
Data.Comment: Carrier for data produced by USM

Data.Name: FLGVSC3
Data.Comment: Carrier for physical data acquired from ECM

Data.Name: FLGVSC4
Data.Comment: Carrier for data produced by ECM

Data.Name: Cnxuce9
Data.Comment: connection status with ECU n°9 (automatic gear box)

Data.Name: FLGVSC5
Data.Comment: Carrier for data produced by ECM

Data.Name: Etapro
Data.Comment: Boolean indicating whether status is protected

Data.Name: Cnxuce8
Data.Comment: connection status with ECU n°8 (climate control)

Data.Name: Cnxuce4
Data.Comment: connection status with ECU n°4 (Car body)

Data.Name: Cnxuce3
Data.Comment: connection status with ECU n°3 (Instrument Panel)

Data.Name: Cnxuce1
Data.Comment: connection status with ECU n°1(engine control unit) only for LPG ECU

Data.Name: Crashmem
Data.Comment: diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame

Data.Name: AUTFTMEM
Data.Comment: diag. byte stored upon last anomalous engine cut off
